content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.51%, Bank Nifty -0.88%, VIX +2.95% to 17.11 — broad tape weak but pockets of strong stock-specific Q4-results momentum (COFORGE +15.6%, SRF +10.3%, POLYCAB +9.2%, PIDILITIND +8.6%). Book is heavily deployed (67%) with 14 holdings; priority is trailing SLs on winners and managing the binary HAL event (May 14 results, 4 sessions away). Limited new entry capacity given sector concentration in Specialty Chem, Defense, Financials.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.4% winner, CMP 1083.60. Trail SL from 1064.67 to 1055 (locks in +7.2% min, gap to CMP 2.6% — clears 1% trail-gap floor). Target intact at 1135 (Motilal Oswal TP 1260; conservative). Strong Q4, sector tailwind."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, -0.3%. SL 121 intact, room to run on geopolitical/macro hedge. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4730.00,
      "new_target": 5000.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.8% winner, CMP 4790. Board meeting May 14 (4 sessions) — Rule 11 binary discipline applies. Position size ~₹52K (5.1% of capital) is at the event-trade ceiling. Choosing option (b) tighten SL: 4730 caps downside to entry+3.4%, gap to CMP 1.25% (clears trail floor). Will reassess closer to event for option (a) full exit if size grows."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 7,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.9%, CMP 7043 vs SL 6960 — only 1.2% above SL with intraday range 6996-7071 putting SL within reach. Today's price action faded sharply from 52w-high 7200 on Apr 30. Stored SL at 6960 is too tight for normal noise (any wobble triggers it). Rather than micro-trail or accept guaranteed stopout, exit positively on SRF-led sector euphoria. Free up ~₹49K capital. Note: this is a defensible exit (SL too tight, not pre-SL panic per Rule 17 — the SL itself is the issue, position is gone-or-stopped within 1.2%)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.2%, CMP 365.50 vs SL 365.00 — exactly at SL. Per Rule 17, do NOT pre-empt SL. Q4 PAT +31%, lending book crossed ₹2L cr milestone — thesis intact. Let SL fire if it fires; recovery option preserved. SL already tight."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 822.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.2%, CMP 830.60. SL at 822 is already breakeven-plus. No change — same as stored. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correcting prior — SL 822 already at breakeven, target 860 unchanged. No-op MODIFY would be wasted signal. Strong Q4, FMCG defensive bid. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1329.47,
      "new_target": 1395.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+7.1% winner, CMP 1351.20. Stored SL 1329.47 is already at +5.6% lock-in, gap to CMP 1.6% — clears trail floor. Wait one more day before tightening further given strong Q4 momentum and target 1395 close. No change — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1329.47 already locks in +5.6%. Gap to CMP 1.6% (clears 1% trail floor). No-op MODIFY avoided. Target 1395 in reach."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3010.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4%, CMP 3062.50. Trail SL from 2998 to 3010 (–1.7% from CMP, clears 1% floor). FY26 results strong (+38% rev, +42% PAT), Antique TP 3141. Raises lock-in marginally without forcing exit on noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 827.41,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.4%, CMP 842.60. Stored SL 827.41 = entry+2.7% lock, gap to CMP 1.8% — clears floor. No-op avoided, switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 827.41 already locks +2.7%. Gap to CMP 1.8% adequate. Q4 record revenue, near 52w high. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.7%, CMP 1481.20 (intraday spiked to 1515 on Q4 +37% PAT beat then faded). SL 1445 below entry 1490 — appropriate, give thesis room. Strong fundamentals. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.2%, CMP 2433. Q4 results today strong (PBT +115%, US +46%, 900% dividend, USFDA Glycerol approval). Stock spiked to 2475 then faded — typical post-results volatility. SL 2400 has 1.4% room. Thesis just confirmed; do not pre-empt SL (Rule 17)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.2%, CMP 1614.80. Q4 turnaround massive (loss to ₹164 cr profit, EBITDA margin 20.3%). SL 1580 (-2.3% from entry) appropriate. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2725.00,
      "new_target": 2920.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.1%, CMP 2782 (today +10.3% breakout post Q4). Tighten SL from 2700 to 2725 (entry-2.2%, gap to CMP 2.0%). Today's session opened at 2775 high 2819 — strong move, give a wider trail than tightest. Q4 strong, Refrigerants ramp catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.2%, CMP 9103.50. Just entered, today +9.2% on record Q4. SL 8800 (-3.3% from entry) appropriate for fresh entry — let it work. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Pending OPEN BUY at 2015 from earlier. Stock currently extended (+9.35% near 52w high). Letting limit sit; if it doesn't fill at 2015 today, will cancel tomorrow. Not stacking a second order."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Old MIS BUY at 133.50 from 3280m ago — well past intraday window. Should have been auto-cancelled or rejected. Not adding to it. Will let order layer handle staleness."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL 1064.67 → 1055 to lock +7.2% with appropriate 2.6% gap to CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, SL 121 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4730.00,
      "reasoning": "Binary catalyst (May 14 board, 4 sessions). Tighten SL to 4730 (entry+3.4% lock, CMP-gap 1.25%) per Rule 11 option (b)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL too tight (1.2% from CMP), forced-exit path. Close on sector euphoria, free capital."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "At SL — respect it per Rule 17. Q4 thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 822 already at breakeven+. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1329.47 locks +5.6%, gap 1.6% adequate. Let target hit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 3010.00,
      "reasoning": "Marginal trail to 3010 (entry-0.5%) to reduce downside while preserving recovery."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 827.41 locks +2.7%, gap 1.8% adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1445 gives thesis room. Q4 strong."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results today were excellent. SL 2400 with 1.4% room. Do not pre-empt."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 turnaround thesis intact, SL 1580 adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 2725.00,
      "reasoning": "Marginal trail post +10% breakout day, lock entry-2.2%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Fresh entry, SL 8800 (-3.3%) appropriate."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "TITAGARH +5.9x volume on flat price suggests distribution/absorption — wait for direction. THERMAX, FINCABLES, BHARATFORG (pending order), GABRIEL, BHARATFORG cluster all capital goods — already represented via HAL/GRSE/POLYCAB. LUPIN/WOCKPHARMA cover pharma; not adding more. Most BULLISH-rated names today already in book. New BUYs deferred today — book is at 67% deployed with 14 holdings; sector caps tight on Specialty Chem (NAVINFLUOR exit relieves), Capital Goods (HAL+GRSE+POLYCAB), Financials (PNBHOUSING+ABCAPITAL+CAMS). Will revisit after NAVINFLUOR exit clears capacity.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day 19, 67% deployed, +1.46% session. Book is well-distributed across Q4-results winners. Key risk: HAL May 14 board — managed via SL tighten (Rule 11 option b). NAVINFLUOR exited due to too-tight SL (forced-exit path). After this tick: 13 holdings, ~62% deployed, ~₹387K cash. Not chasing the +9-15% breakout names today (POLYCAB already in book, COFORGE already in book) — adding extended names at peak is the failure mode. Monitor BHARATFORG pending limit; if stays unfilled by EOD will cancel."
}
